description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a thin, dark bezel. The front surface is dominated by the screen, which appears to have a matte or semi-gloss finish, reducing glare. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, angular stand with a broad, flat base and a central column that connects to the rear of the display. The rear panel is smooth and unadorned, with a geometric cutout detail near the top left, adding a touch of visual interest. No physical buttons, ports, or branding are visible on any side of the monitor. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary office or home environments.
description: A sleek, wide flat-panel computer monitor with a thin bezel and a sturdy, angular stand. The design is minimalist, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding.
description_view_0: The monitor is seen from the side, highlighting its slim profile and the angular, flat base of the stand.
description_view_1: The front view shows the wide, rectangular display with a thin bezel and the full width of the screen.
description_view_2: Another side view, emphasizing the monitor's thinness and the depth of the stand's base.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a smooth back panel with a geometric cutout detail and the central support column of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and dark-colored, with a smooth, matte appearance and sharp corners. It is visually unobtrusive, providing a modern, minimalist frame for the display.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a flat, rectangular base with a central, angular support column. It appears to be made of plastic or metal, offering stability without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
